title: Stack-Item Relation Definition
description: Defines the relationship and sovereignty score between a Stack and an Item. Maps which items are part of a stack and how they rate on sovereignty.

role.description: Role of the stack relative to this item (what is the stack's relationship to this item)

sovereigntyScore.description: Sovereignty score for this item in this stack context (0–1, where 1 = fully sovereign)

rationale.description: Localized explanation why this item is in the stack and its sovereignty rating

alternatives.description: Alternative items that could replace this one
